primary_operations.name: Get
primary_operations.sdk_call: resp, err := c.client.Get(url); if err != nil { return nil, err }; defer resp.Body.Close(); return io.ReadAll(resp.Body)

primary_operations.name: Post
primary_operations.sdk_call: resp, err := c.client.Post(url, "application/json", bytes.NewReader(body)); if err != nil { return nil, err }; defer resp.Body.Close(); return io.ReadAll(resp.Body)

code_style_notes: always defer resp.Body.Close() to release the connection
non-2xx HTTP status is NOT an error in net/http; check resp.StatusCode if required
